C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID KAHN WAS NOT ABLE TO GET PARTIES TO SETTLE. BOTH COUNSEL INDICATED THAT THEY WANT TO STIPULATE TO A CONTINUANCE IN THIS MATTER AND REQEUSTED TO APPEAR IN DEPARTMENT 1 IN THE AFTERNOON ON 8/15/96. DUE TO PRESCHEDULED MEETING JUDGE MASON COULDN'T MEET WITH THEM AT THIS TIME SO THEY WILL BE COMMING IN TO DEPARTMENT #1 TOMORROW ON 8/16/96 AT 9:00 A.M. TO REQUEST THE CONTINUANCE BY STIPULATION.

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: PLTF ATNY CHARLES DORSETT APPEARED IN DEPT 1 AT 9:00AM TO REQUEST CONTINUANCE ON BEHALF OF PARTIES & WITH AGREEMNT OF DEFT COUNSEL MS. POMEROY.
